topics.title: Rumors Regarding Vito and Dancing with the Stars
topics.summary: The studio discusses rumors concerning a man named Vito, the potential career impact of a guest appearing on Dancing with the Stars, and various television programs.

topics.title: Prison Sentences and Radio Career Struggles
topics.summary: The show features discussions regarding the length of prison sentences for high-profile figures, the challenges of pursuing a career in radio, and behind-the-scenes anecdotes from film production.

topics.title: Opie and Anthony Transition to Terrestrial Radio
topics.summary: The studio discusses the move of Opie and Anthony to terrestrial radio, the firing of David Lee Roth from CBS, and upcoming plans for a film festival.

topics.title: Contract Disputes and Promotional Stunts
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal complexities of radio contracts, David Lee Roth's transition to satellite radio, and a listener's extreme offer for a high-definition television.

topics.title: David Lee Roth and Radio Industry Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio discusses the fallout of David Lee Roth’s failed radio transition, the resurgence of Opie and Anthony on terrestrial radio, and various segments including a caller's personal situation and a discussion on athlete discipline.

topics.title: Radio Censorship and Industry Transitions
topics.summary: The studio discusses the challenges of corporate censorship, the transition of talent between radio platforms like XM and Sirius, and the personal impact of restricted language on a broadcaster's performance.

topics.title: Challenges of Terrestrial Radio Censorship
topics.summary: The studio discusses the difficulties of maintaining a comedic style on terrestrial radio due to strict regulations, while contrasting those limitations with the freedom found on satellite platforms.

topics.title: Radio Industry Legal Challenges and Satellite Competition
topics.summary: The studio discusses legal hurdles regarding FCC fines, the impact of satellite radio on terrestrial broadcasting, and various segments featuring guest appearances.

topics.title: New York Auto Show and Guest Interview
topics.summary: The studio discusses upcoming appearances at a car show before transitioning into an interview with adult film actress Crystal Clear regarding her past in a residential treatment facility.

topics.title: Porn Star Career and Personal History
topics.summary: The studio features a guest who discusses her career in the adult film industry, including upcoming projects with older men, her experiences in recovery from drug use, and personal history regarding childhood trauma.

topics.title: Adult Film Star Interview
topics.summary: The studio features a conversation with Crystal Clear regarding her career in adult film, including discussions about contract negotiations and interactions with other performers.

topics.title: Repetitive Phrase Recording
topics.summary: The show consists of a continuous, repetitive recording of the phrase "I get to know the fat guy" throughout the entire segment.

topics.title: Gossip Game and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio features a gossip game with Mike Walker involving celebrity rumors about Mickey Rourke, Brad Pitt, Simon Cowell, and Barbra Streisand, followed by a discussion on Julia Roberts' Broadway performance.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Radio Industry Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including Bruce Springsteen's musical direction, Mick Jagger's failed acting ventures, celebrity adoption trends, and the abrupt firing of a radio personality.

topics.title: Test Pilot Death and Protest News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the death of test pilot Scott Crossfield, a protest at a Chinese presidential welcome ceremony, and a foiled school shooting plot.

topics.title: Columbine Plot Investigation and MySpace Discussion
topics.summary: The show features a report on the investigation into a foiled plot at a Kansas school, followed by a discussion regarding the utility of MySpace for promotion and its role in law enforcement investigations.
